heroPressQuote: Vancouver's New Cafe Portrait Is A Dream Come True For Art Lovers
section1Para1: Cafe Portrait was born from a simple idea: that great coffee and great art belong together. Founded in the heart of Vancouver's West End, we set out to create a space where the rituals of cafe life — the slow morning espresso, the long brunch with friends — could be elevated by the beauty of original art.
section1Para2: Every piece on our walls is curated from local artists, changing seasonally to ensure that each visit brings something new to discover. We believe art should be part of everyday life, not locked away in galleries.
section2Para1: We source our beans directly from small-batch farms across Ethiopia, Colombia, and Guatemala. Each lot is selected for its unique character and roasted in small batches in-house, ensuring peak freshness in every cup.
section2Para2: Our head roaster brings a decade of experience to every blend, working closely with our baristas to dial in extraction profiles that honour the origin of each bean.
section3Para1: Our kitchen team draws inspiration from global brunch traditions — from the shakshuka of North Africa to the smashed steak plates of Buenos Aires — reimagined with locally sourced, seasonal ingredients.
section3Para2: Brunch is served all day, and our After 4 menu shifts toward richer, more indulgent evening fare. Whatever brings you in, we want you to leave feeling nourished.
closingQuote: Something to eat and drink for every mood, and an art space to leave you inspired.
